meaning: n.气体处理,吹嘘,毒气攻击
examples: Well, I can't sit here gassing all day.
They were still gassing (away) when I left.
Vents should be cut where the 'gassing' occurs.
The survivor, a fungus called Muscodor albus, had killed the others by gassing them.
Martin Golden of Brooklyn spending campaign funds for regularly gassing up vehicles in Mahwah and Hackensack, N.
